resources.string: Check your sleep duration to know whether your sleep is enough, lack, or excessive. This app also provides health tips based on your sleep time and gender.

DozyMate is an application used to calculate sleep duration. This app helps users know whether their sleep is sufficient, lack, or excessive.
By using this app users can improve their sleep quality and maintain better health.

Benefits of enough sleep:
• Improve concentration • Maintain body stamina • Improve mood • Improve brain performance • Maintain immune system • Reduce stress

Tips for better sleep:
• Sleep at same time everyday • Avoid phone before sleep • Keep room dark • Avoid caffeine at night • Use comfortable pillow • Relax before sleep
